episodes.title: Cult Leader Kent Hovind Can't Fathom Basic Science
episodes.description:
Kent Hovind has been demoted to the second channel! Let's watch Kent try to wrap his mind around basic evolution. I'm sick of banging my head against a wall with this guy so he now only gets low effort responses. Cult Leader Kent Hovind Can't Fathom Basic Science
